strategies.label: Enforce SSL-only S3 requests (strict deny)

fields.description: Merge with existing bucket policy statements instead of replacing.
fields.impact_text: After applying, non-HTTPS requests to this bucket will be denied (HTTP requests receive 403).

dependency_checks.message: Non-TLS clients and legacy integrations will fail after strict SSL policy enforcement.
Runtime policy capture failed (NoSuchBucket); customer-run Terraform will fetch and merge the live bucket policy at plan/apply time.
Unable to inspect current bucket policy (NoSuchBucket).

warnings: Non-TLS clients or legacy integrations will fail after apply.

If the bucket already has a policy, capture it before apply with `aws s3api get-bucket-policy --bucket <BUCKET_NAME> --query Policy --output text > pre-remediation-policy.json`; rollback restores it with `aws s3api put-bucket-policy --bucket <BUCKET_NAME> --policy file://pre-remediation-policy.json`.
strategies.impact_text: After applying, all HTTP (non-HTTPS) requests to this bucket will receive a 403 Forbidden response.

preservation_summary.apply_time_merge_reason: Runtime capture failed (NoSuchBucket), so the customer-run Terraform bundle must fetch the live policy.

strategies.decision_rationale: Family resolver kept S3.5 strategy 's3_enforce_ssl_strict_deny' executable because Terraform can merge the current bucket policy at apply time. Runtime capture failed (NoSuchBucket), so the customer-run Terraform bundle must fetch the live policy.

strategies.label: Enforce SSL with principal exemptions

fields.description: Merge with existing bucket policy statements instead of replacing.
fields.impact_text: After applying, non-HTTPS requests to this bucket will be denied (HTTP requests receive 403).

fields.description: IAM principal ARNs exempted from the strict deny rule.

warnings: Exemptions weaken blanket enforcement and must be tightly scoped.

If the bucket already has a policy, capture it before apply with `aws s3api get-bucket-policy --bucket <BUCKET_NAME> --query Policy --output text > pre-remediation-policy.json`; rollback restores it with `aws s3api put-bucket-policy --bucket <BUCKET_NAME> --policy file://pre-remediation-policy.json`.
strategies.impact_text: After applying, all HTTP (non-HTTPS) requests to this bucket will receive a 403 Forbidden response.

preservation_summary.apply_time_merge_reason: Runtime capture failed (NoSuchBucket), so the customer-run Terraform bundle must fetch the live policy.

strategies.decision_rationale: Family resolver kept S3.5 strategy 's3_enforce_ssl_with_principal_exemptions' executable because Terraform can merge the current bucket policy at apply time. Runtime capture failed (NoSuchBucket), so the customer-run Terraform bundle must fetch the live policy.

strategies.label: Keep non-SSL behavior (exception path)

fields.description: How long should this exception remain active?
Why can't you apply this fix right now?
fields.placeholder: Describe the temporary business or operational constraint.

dependency_checks.message: Keeping non-SSL traffic allows plaintext request channels.
Downgrade to review_required_bundle when existing bucket policy statements are detected but their JSON was not captured for safe merge.

warnings: Allowing non-SSL requests increases credential and data interception risk.
strategies.impact_text: Non-HTTPS requests remain allowed until the exception is resolved and SSL enforcement is applied.
blocked_reasons: Downgrade to review_required_bundle when existing bucket policy statements are detected but their JSON was not captured for safe merge.
strategies.decision_rationale: Compatibility resolver defaulted to the compatible profile 's3_keep_non_ssl_exception' for strategy 's3_keep_non_ssl_exception'. Blocking checks: Downgrade to review_required_bundle when existing bucket policy statements are detected but their JSON was not captured for safe merge..

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_low__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is low and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.80, privilege_level=0.60, internet_exposure=0.60, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.
